page_metadata.biotools__summary: R package that facilitates the detection and visualization of changes in the relative transcription from promoter regions in multi-promoter genes, all in the context of overall gene expression. Multiple samples can be compared simultaneously.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: R package that facilitates the detection and visualization of changes in the relative transcription from promoter regions in multi-promoter genes, all in the context of overall gene expression. Multiple samples can be compared simultaneously.
